name: Secret Tunnel
flavor: Realms at War — a hidden passage beneath the Field. Reskin of the Teleporter.
summary: Activate at the end of a Move in contact (no enemy also touching): place your Warrior in contact with any other Secret Tunnel in play. This immediately ends your Move. A Firepot or Boulder touching a Secret Tunnel may be sent through just before it lands.

effects.text: Relocate to any other Secret Tunnel in play; ends the Move.
